scholarship_name: SC/ST Free Messing and Pocket Allowance Support
category_requirement: SC or ST; official income/eligibility rules apply
benefit_description: Free basic messing, pocket allowance of INR 500 per month for 10 months, and hostel room-rent exemption under stated rules. Benefit amount field records pocket allowance only.
duration: Academic year; renewal subject to rules
required_documents: Valid category certificate; income certificate; institute documents
